The '''''Legacy of Torment''''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Kor Chokk]] grand cruiser assigned to [[Shedao Shai]], during his attempt to continue the invasion of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was the size of a [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]].

==History==
The ''Legacy of Torment'' was the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] during the [[Battle of Garqi]] as well as the [[Battle of Ithor]]. However, after Shedao Shai's death, [[Deign Lian]] took command of the ship and ordered the destruction of [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]]. Billions of lethal bioweapons were dropped onto Ithor's surface via [[yorik coral]] pods, rendering the planet lifeless almost immediately.

Once the planet was rendered lifeless, Lian ordered the Yuuzhan Vong fleet back to [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion]]. Unknown to the Yuuzhan Vong, [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Traest Kre'fey]] had ordered the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] ''[[Corusca Rainbow]]'' to Ithor, and he used its [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projectors]] to hold the Yuuzhan Vong fleet near Ithor. Kre'fey then ordered all ships to fire on the Yuuzhan Vong fleet. The New Republic's forces decimated the fleet, and the ''Legacy of Torment'' was destroyed. The ship crashed into Ithor, setting off intense, planet-sweeping fires.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' {{1st}}
